title: Repository Metadata
description: Standardized metadata contract for repositories in the spectrum-systems ecosystem.

schema_version.description: Version of the repository metadata schema.

repo_type.description: Role of the repository within the ecosystem.

description.description: Concise statement of the repository's purpose.

governed_by.description: Upstream governance authority for this repository (e.g., constitution repo or standards manifest owner).

contact.description: Contact channel for the maintainer (email or Slack handle).

maintainer.description: Primary maintainer responsible for repository stewardship.

contracts_used.description: List of contract or schema identifiers this repository implements or depends on.

last_architecture_review.description: Date of the most recent architecture/design review (YYYY-MM-DD).
